commands.purpose: Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped program view. Filter by status. --include-archived shows archived rows; default hides them.
Scriptable program creation (test harness + tenant onboarding). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting.
Transition program status draft -> active OR paused -> active. Refuses when program has no distributable codes (auto-issues user codes as a side effect for existing users).
Transition program status active -> paused. New claims refused; existing in-flight referrals complete.
Terminal transition. Prompts for confirmation. Cascades: pending referrals cancel + materialized-not-yet-paid rewards clawback. Audit-critical.

Manually generate a user_scoped code for a specific user + program. Common case is auto-issued by IssueReferralCodeJob at user-activation time; this exists for the edge cases (user activated before the program launched).
CLI equivalent of POST /referral-codes. Admin-generated codes for external campaigns (SUMMER25). Consumes 1 unit of `referrals_code_slot` entitlement.
Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped referral ledger. Filter by program, referrer/referred user, status, date range.
Verbose read of one referral: base fields + attribution_snapshot summary + device_snapshot hashes + reward rows + fraud flag rows + audit trail summary.

Support-plane cancel. --force bypasses the state-machine guards (allows cancel from terminal states — used for post-mortem correction only). Prompts for confirmation unless --no-interaction. Cascades pending/vesting/materialized rewards.

Enterprise-only admin override. Forces a referral in status IN ('trigger_pending','vesting') straight to vested + creates rewards. Refuses when tenant lacks `referrals_manual_override` entitlement. Audit-critical (records --reason).
Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped fraud flag view. Default disposition=unreviewed shows pending-review flags. Filter by severity + flag_type.
Admin review a flag. --disposition IN (confirmed_fraud / false_positive / manual_override_approved). Cascades per observer semantics.

Enterprise-only. Bulk override every fraud flag on a specific referral with disposition=manual_override_approved. Permits the referral to proceed. Audit-critical + refuses when tenant lacks `referrals_manual_override`.
